zh.Duchy of Glogau, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 格洛高
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix von Silesia於1290年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 格洛高時，她的父親Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I37歲，母親Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard19歲。她於1308年10月14日與Ludwig IV von Bayern在德國貝也明陳結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年9月1日在德國貝也明陳享年32歲，埋葬在德國貝也貝易特阿爾史塔特。

zh-hans.Duchy of Glogau, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 格洛高
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix von Silesia于1290年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀爾左圖姆 格洛高时，她的父亲Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I37岁，母亲Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard19岁。她于1308年10月14日与Ludwig IV von Bayern在德国貝也明陳结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年9月1日在德国貝也明陳享年32岁，埋葬在德国貝也貝易特阿爾史塔特。

nameMeanings.name: von

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix von Silesia was born in 1290, in Duchy of Glogau, Holy Roman Empire, her father, Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I, was 37 and her mother, Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard, was 19. She married Ludwig IV von Bayern on 14 October 1308, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 September 1322, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 32, and was buried in Altstadt, Bayreuth, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix von Silesia est née en 1290, à Herzogtum Glogau, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig IV von Bayern le 14 octobre 1308, à München, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1322, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Altstadt, Bayreuth, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix von Silesia 1290 in Herzogtum Glogau, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I 37 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard 19. Sie hat am 14. Oktober 1308 in München, Bayern, Deutschland Ludwig IV von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. September 1322 im Alter von 32 Jahren in München, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Altstadt, Bayreuth, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix von Silesia è nata il nel 1290 nel Herzogtum Glogau, Heiliges Römisches Reich, sua padre, Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig IV von Bayern il 14 ottobre 1308, nel München, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1322, nel München, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Altstadt, Bayreuth, Bayern, Germania.

ja.Duchy of Glogau, Holy Roman Empire: ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチハーゾグトゥム グロガウ
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Silesiaが1290年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチハーゾグトゥム グロガウで生まれた時，父Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland Iは37歳，母Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargardは19歳であった。1308年10月14日にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンでLudwig IV von Bayernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年9月1日にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンで32歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンバイレウスアルトスタトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Silesia(이)가 1290년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 허초그투 그로가에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1308년 10월 14일 독일 베이른 u천에서 Ludwig IV von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 9월 1일 독일 베이른 u천에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 베이레우스 알츠타드트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix von Silesia nasceu em 1290, em Herzogtum Glogau, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig IV von Bayern em 14 de outubro de 1308, em München, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1322, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Altstadt, Bayreuth, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix von Silesia родилась в 1290 г. в местности хирзогтум глогау, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, её отцу по имени Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig IV von Bayern 14 октября 1308 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 сентября 1322 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности алцтадт, беиреут, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix von Silesia nació en 1290, en Herzogtum Glogau, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Bolko "Bolesław" "The Strict" of Poland I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ludwig IV von Bayern el 14 de octubre de 1308, en München, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1322, en München, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Altstadt, Bayreuth, Bayern, Alemania.
